title: JobHistoryEventUtils.java
description: This Java file, JobHistoryEventUtils.java, provides utility methods for converting MapReduce counters to JSON and TimelineMetrics. It contains the class `JobHistoryEventUtils` with methods `countersToJSON` and `countersToTimelineMetric`. The former converts counters to JSON, while the latter transforms them into TimelineMetrics. Both methods iterate over `CounterGroup` and `Counter` objects, creating JSON objects or TimelineMetrics for each. The class depends on packages like Jackson for JSON operations and Hadoop for MapReduce-related classes. It uses HashSet for storing TimelineMetrics and requires `Counters` and a timestamp as inputs, returning JSON Node or a set of TimelineMetrics as outputs.

Both methods iterate over `CounterGroup` and `Counter` objects, creating JSON objects or TimelineMetrics for each.
